definitions.text: i middelalderen: hærtog for å befri Det hellige land fra muslimene
definitions.translation: in the Middle Ages: military expedition to liberate the Holy Land from Muslims

definitions.text: krigersk ekspedisjon mot vantro og kjettere og for å utbre den kristne tro
definitions.translation: warlike expedition against infidels and heretics to spread the Christian faith

definitions.text: kamp for en god, viktig sak
definitions.translation: campaign for a good, important cause
